---
title: "STA572:Time Series Analysis and Forecasting"
subtitle: "C5. Box Jenkins Model"
format: 
  revealjs:
    chalkboard: true
    fontsize: 20pt
    css: mystyle.css
    slide-number: true
author: "Lecturer, Department of Statistics"
footer: "Asmui Rahim, STA572 , Oct 2025"
execute: 
  echo: true
  warning: false
---

# Model Identification

## Time Series Plot

```{r}
snp <- read.csv("SNP500.csv", header=T)
snp_ts <- ts(snp[,6], frequency=1)
plot(snp_ts)
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r}
set.seed(123)
e <- rnorm(100, mean=0, sd=1)
acf(e, main="")
```
